summary: Frontend 10/10 Marketplace Polish Pack + Brand Excellence Pack testing completed. All 15 features tested and working correctly. HomepageV2 renders with all premium components, country selector modal works for first-time visitors, localStorage correctly saves country/region preferences, mobile responsive navbar works, and marketplace browse page shows proper empty state with filters.

issues: Minor: Hero area shows 'Tanzania • Dar es Salaam' badge correctly after country selection - displays 'Africa-ready marketplace' when no country selected

homepage_v2.notes: HomepageV2 renders correctly as root route with all premium components in correct order

country_selector_modal.notes: Modal appears when no country is set in localStorage. Shows all 7 countries (TZ, KE, UG, RW, NG, GH, ZA) with flags and region selection step

localStorage_persistence.notes: customer_country_code and customer_region keys are correctly saved to localStorage after selection

hero_section.notes: Premium hero with country-aware messaging, stats grid (Products & Services, Ordering, Support, Growth Model), and category cards (Promotional Products, Office Supplies, Business Services)

trust_strip.notes: Trust Strip displays 4 trust indicators: Business-focused marketplace, Country-aware availability, Trusted service workflows, Centralized ordering & support

client_trust_strip.notes: Shows 'Built for businesses that value reliability' with trust badges

category_showcase.notes: 4 category cards with icons - Promotional Products, Office Equipment, Printing Services, Creative & Design. All link correctly to /marketplace or /services with category filters

how_it_works.notes: 3 numbered steps with icons: Choose country/region, Browse products or request services, Track fulfillment in one place

why_choose_section.notes: 6 checkmark items explaining Konekt benefits - all render correctly with dark check icons

expansion_section.notes: Multi-Country Expansion section with partner CTA button linking to /launch-country

testimonials_section.notes: 3 testimonial quotes with role/company attribution (Operations Manager, Procurement Lead, Business Founder)

final_cta_section.notes: Premium CTA card with 'Start Browsing' and 'Go to My Account' buttons - both link correctly

premium_footer_v2.notes: Footer with 4 sections (Konekt branding, Marketplace, Business, Support) and all links functional

marketplace_browse_page.notes: Standalone page at /marketplace with search input, category filter, type filter. Shows empty state when no listings

mobile_navbar.notes: Mobile menu toggle works correctly - opens/closes with Menu button showing hamburger/X icons

critical_code_review_comments: All components have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
localStorage preference system working correctly with customer_country_code and customer_region keys
Category cards correctly link to filtered marketplace/services pages
Footer links all functional and point to correct routes
Mobile responsive design properly implemented with collapsible navbar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend 10/10 Marketplace Polish Pack fully tested. HomepageV2 is now the root route. Country selector modal saves preferences to localStorage (customer_country_code, customer_region). All homepage sections render in correct order. Marketplace browse page works at /marketplace. Mobile responsive navbar toggle works correctly. No console errors detected during testing.

mobile.issues: None - responsive design works correctly, mobile menu functional
